entry.value: {"is_active":false,"banner_text":{"en":"%@%% off Memrise Lifetime - Limited time offer!","en-US":"%@%% off Memrise Lifetime - Limited time offer!","fr":"%@%% de réduction sur Memrise à vie - Offre à durée limitée !","ar":"خصم %@%% على Memrise Lifetime - عرض لفترة محدودة!","de":"%@%% Rabatt auf Memrise auf Lebenszeit - Nur für kurze Zeit!","es":"%@%% de descuento en Memrise vitalicio. ¡Oferta limitada!","es-419":"¡Memrise vitalicio al %@ %% por tiempo limitado!","id":"Diskon %@%% untuk Memrise seumur hidup | Promo terbatas!","hi":"Memrise लाइफ़टाइम पर %@%% छूट - सीमित समय के लिए ऑफ़र!","it":"Sconto del %@%% su Memrise a vita - Offerta a tempo limitato!","pl":"%@%% zniżki na Premium Na Zawsze - Oferta ograniczona czasowo!","pt-BR":"%@%% OFF no Memrise Vitalício - Oferta por tempo limitado!","pt":"%@%% de desconto num Plano Memrise Vitalício - Oferta Limitada!","tr":"Memrise Yaşamboyu planda %%%@ indirim - Sınırlı süreli teklif!","ru":"Скидка %@%% на Бессрочную подписку Memrise - предложение ограничено по времени!","vi":"Ưu đãi %@%% cho Memrise Trọn Đời - Ưu đãi có hạn!","ja":"Memriseライフタイムプランが期間限定で%@%%オフ！","ko":"멤라이즈 평생 플랜 %@%% 할인 - 기간 한정 혜택!","da":"%@%% rabat på Memrise Lifetime - Tilbud i en begrænset periode!","nl":"%@%% korting op Levenslang Memrise - Tijdelijke aanbieding!","no":"%@ %% avslag på Memrise Livstid – tidsbegrenset tilbud!","sv":"%@%% rabatt på Livstidsabonnemang för Memrise - Begränsat erbjudande!","zh-CN":"忆术家永久订阅%@%%优惠：限时折扣！","zh-TW":"憶術家永久訂閱%@%%優惠：限時折扣！","el":"%@%% off Memrise Lifetime - Limited time offer!"},"products":{"lifetime":{"sku_id":"android_mobile_lifetime60_int","discount_value":60},"annual":{"sku_id":"google_annual_20_date2020_06_15","discount_value":20},"monthly":{"sku_id":"google_monthly_date2021_11","discount_value":0}},"end_day":15}
